elements.title: Margaret
elements.contents: ... that Uranus's moon Margaret (pictured) is named after a Shakespearean character, an astronomer's daughter, and its discoverer's mother?

elements.title: King Akengbuda
elements.contents: ... that, when King Akengbuda's heir sent him grey hairs to urge his abdication, he replied with powdered chalk and salt to signify that the world was too pleasant for him to leave?

elements.title: a novel
elements.contents: ... that author Lutz Van Dijk drew inspiration from murdered Ugandan LGBTQ activist David Kato to write a novel about a gay Ugandan teenager fleeing persecution?

elements.title: Pedro Morales Pino
elements.contents: ... that, when Pedro Morales Pino took his band on their first international tour, they lost members to typhus, marriage, schizophrenia, and suicide?

elements.title: spinocerebellar ataxia type 7
elements.contents: ... that spinocerebellar ataxia type 7 is the only type of spinocerebellar ataxia that consistently results in vision degradation?

elements.title: Kāneikokala
elements.contents: ... that the shark god Kāneikokala, according to Hawaiian tradition, rescued shipwrecked sailors and returned them to their home islands?

elements.title: King
elements.contents: ... that Kanye West claims in his song "King" that he would not have married Bianca Censori without the work of Martin Luther King Jr.?

elements.title: Maria Afonso
elements.contents: ... that the reliquary believed to contain the remains of Maria Afonso may instead hold the body of her infant nephew?

elements.title: Sheikh Chilli
elements.contents: ... that Sheikh Chilli may not be Sheikh Chilli?
